title: ::BASKET_AND_FREEZE_AA036::
content:
::BASKET_AND_FREEZE_AA036::

I am entering basket mode.

During this time:
- All new ideas, thoughts, thread entries, or prompts are dumped to `/UNSORTED_INT4KE/`
- No naming decisions will be required
- No routing, tagging, or logic enforcement will be active
- System-wide sort, freeze, or export are paused

You may still:
- Drop raw thoughts
- Upload files
- Create threads
- Ask questions

When I’m ready to resume structure, I’ll say:
::UNFREEZE_AND_SORT_AA037::

This is a protected creative state. Nothing is being lost.

::END_PROTOCOL::

📦 Want These as Files?
Say the word and I’ll deliver:
.md versions
.txt versions
context: From document: 🧠 YES. You're calling for full ceremonial protocol exports — no shortcuts… — chunk 10 (chunk 10/11)
